title: Probe rebuildable project cognition before selecting a durable form

mainline.contradiction: The project can construct useful temporary source-linked models, but it cannot yet preserve and selectively refresh project cognition across tasks without creating a second canon or leaking domain semantics into Work Cell and Swarm.
acceptance: A fixed-revision second-project comparison distinguishes a strong single-agent temporary model from semantically partitioned Work Cell cognition using withheld downstream questions and source-backed relation coverage.
A typed coverage ledger preserves authority, licensed-derivation, reconstructible-projection, causal, execution-evidence, and acceptance relations through synthesis.
One bounded revision delta invalidates and refreshes only affected packets while reconnecting cross-packet boundaries and reporting missed or uncertain impact.
All cognition artifacts remain rebuildable, non-authoritative projections over named sources; no source, Work Cell core, Swarm kernel, or sibling project is mutated or made a dependency.
The default cognition surface is a small index plus bounded question-owned shards; large run records remain referenced cold evidence and no monolithic integrated model is required for agent use.

A domain method and caller select each partition from the actual project, named decision, and cognition relations; Work Cell and Swarm retain only generic execution mechanics and no fixed decomposition taxonomy.
The result produces a form decision or an explicit no-change disposition; it does not infer a Skill or runtime from model output alone.

branches.purpose: Compare temporary and semantically partitioned cognition on a fixed second-project source tree, then test one typed, bounded incremental refresh without selecting durable storage or runtime form.
branches.returnCondition: Source revisions, packet boundaries, accepted local records, typed synthesis, withheld-question comparison, delta invalidation audit, observed work/cost, privacy limits, and disconfirming results are retained for independent form review.
